ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "opposition" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue */,
  "venue_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of balls bowled by the player */,
  "catches_taken" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken by the player */,
  "stumps" INTEGER /* Number of stumps taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opposition_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opposing team */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: ID of the team the player belongs to
Unique identifier for each player statistic
Number of runs scored by the player
Number of wickets taken by the player
Number of balls bowled by the player
Number of catches taken by the player
Number of stumps taken by the player
Unique identifier for each match result
